ham.subject: Amazon Order Confirmation: Your order #123-4567890-1234567 has been shipped
ham.body:
Hello John Doe,

Thank you for shopping with Amazon.

We are pleased to inform you that your order #123-4567890-1234567 has been shipped and is on its way. Please find the details below:

Order Summary:
• 1× Wireless Mouse (Black)
• 2× USB-C Cable (3 meters)
• 1× Laptop Sleeve (15.6")

Total Charged: $89.99 (incl. tax)

Shipping Address:
John Doe
123 Maple Street
Springfield, IL 62704
United States

Track your shipment: <URL>

If you have any questions or need assistance, please contact Amazon Customer Service.

Thank you for choosing Amazon.

Best regards,
Amazon.com

Customer Support

spam.subject: Urgent: Crypto Wallet Suspended – Immediate Action Required
spam.body:
Dear User,

We have detected suspicious activity on your crypto wallet and, in accordance with our security protocols, your wallet has been temporarily suspended pending verification.

To restore access to your funds, please complete the verification process within the next 24 hours by clicking the link below:

<URL>

Failure to verify will result in permanent suspension and potential loss of your cryptocurrency holdings.

If you have any questions or believe this is a mistake, contact our Crypto Security Team immediately.

Thank you for your prompt attention.

Sincerely,
Crypto Security Team
